commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=35ea3ca49c9c54b9d96c561c25a06a4623975ebb)
commands.review_summary:
The PR repairs model/provider edge cases across SQLite state upgrades, provider base URL defaults, OpenRouter cache retention, apply_patch gating, configure cleanup, and GitHub Copilot thinking policy lookup.

PR surface: Source +477, Tests +505. Total +982 across 27 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: adding `wake_mode` as `auto` and then loading it through `rowToCronJob` produces a value outside the documented cron wake-mode union. I did not run tests because this is a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A narrow automated repair can normalize the cron wake-mode migration without deciding new product behavior; the maintainer label means a human should choose whether to promote that repair.

target.title: fix: repair model provider edge cases
target.body:
## Summary

- repair additive SQLite state schema upgrades uncovered during live inference testing on an older state DB
- honor `OPENAI_BASE_URL` / `ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL` defaults across OpenAI, Anthropic, and native PDF paths
- honor OpenRouter Anthropic cache retention for `long` / `none` without forwarding OpenAI-incompatible cache params
- make `apply_patch` provider-neutral while preserving explicit disable and allow-model gates
- let provider-scoped configure cleanup show and prune stale configured model allowlist entries
- expose GitHub Copilot bundled thinking policy so dashboard/offline policy lookups retain xhigh-capable profiles

Refs #74427, #74432, #79370, #88359, #88357, #45269, #80366, #80347, #79894.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/state/openclaw-state-db.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/openai/base-url.test.ts extensions/openai/openai-provider.test.ts src/agents/anthropic-transport-stream.test.ts src/agents/tools/pdf-native-providers.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/prompt-cache-retention.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/extra-params.openrouter-cache-control.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner-extraparams-openrouter.test.ts src/agents/anthropic-payload-policy.test.ts src/llm/providers/stream-wrappers/proxy.test.ts src/llm/providers/stream-wrappers/anthropic-cache-control-payload.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/agent-tools.create-openclaw-coding-tools.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools-agent-config.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/model-picker.test.ts src/commands/configure.gateway-auth.prompt-auth-config.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/github-copilot/provider-policy-api.test.ts extensions/github-copilot/index.test.ts extensions/github-copilot/models.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose -t "provider-policy-api|xhigh|reasoning efforts|static overrides"`
- `pnpm check:changed` via Blacksmith Testbox `tbx_01kt3em5r9vd7g0bnykrff6jdk` (provider `blacksmith-testbox`, exit 0)

## Notes

- PR #88941 was closed separately as already fixed on current main by #88932 handling; this branch does not include that broader strip-thinking implementation.
- Issue #88201 is not closed by this branch; live Anthropic baseline and current-source local inference remain materially different enough to keep it open.
target.author: steipete

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: TurboTheTurtle

target.title: Fix Workboard card status persistence
target.body:
Fixes #88592

## Real behavior proof

Behavior or issue addressed: Workboard linked cards could bounce away from an explicit operator status change because stale linked-session lifecycle sync rewrote the card after drag/edit saves. The follow-up fix also preserves the documented contract that fresh linked session/task lifecycle updates still move active `todo`/`running` cards to `review` or `blocked`.

Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout on macOS, branch `codex/workboard-persist-running`, Node 24.15.0, using the production Workboard UI controller functions from `ui/src/ui/controllers/workboard.ts`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: ran a direct `pnpm exec tsx --eval` command that imports `getWorkboardState`, `moveWorkboardCard`, and `syncWorkboardLifecycle`; it exercises four production-controller scenarios:

- stale completed session after a reload/new host does not overwrite a newer card move
- fresh completed session after a drag to `running` still syncs the card to `review`
- stale completed task after a newer card update does not overwrite the card
- fresh failed task after a newer task update still syncs the card to `blocked`

Evidence after fix:

```console
$ pnpm exec tsx --eval '<script importing getWorkboardState, moveWorkboardCard, syncWorkboardLifecycle from ./ui/src/ui/controllers/workboard.ts and exercising stale/fresh session + task lifecycle sync>'
{
  "staleCompletedSessionAfterReload": {
    "finalStatus": "running",
    "finalPosition": 2000,
    "requestMethods": [],
    "updateWasCalled": false
  },
  "freshCompletedSessionAfterMove": {
    "finalStatus": "review",
    "finalPosition": 2000,
    "requestMethods": [
      "workboard.cards.move",
      "workboard.cards.update"
    ],
    "updatePatch": {
      "status": "review"
    }
  },
  "staleCompletedTaskAfterNewerCardUpdate": {
    "finalStatus": "running",
    "requestMethods": [
      "tasks.list"
    ],
    "updateWasCalled": false
  },
  "freshFailedTaskAfterNewerTaskUpdate": {
    "finalStatus": "blocked",
    "requestMethods": [
      "tasks.list",
      "workboard.cards.update"
    ],
    "updatePatch": {
      "status": "blocked"
    }
  }
}
```

Observed result after fix: stale lifecycle events older than the persisted card update no longer issue `workboard.cards.update`, so the explicit operator change survives reload/new-host state. Fresh completed/failed session and task lifecycle events still issue the expected `workboard.cards.update` patches, preserving active-card lifecycle following.

What was not tested: no live browser recording was captured; the proof exercises the real local Workboard controller path and request methods directly.

## Supplemental validation

- Replaced the transient host-local `manualStatusCardIds` override with a timestamp-aware lifecycle guard based on persisted card update time and linked session/task update time.
- Added controller regressions for stale completed session after edit save, stale completed session after drag, fresh completed session after drag, reload/new-host stale sync, stale completed task, and fresh failed task lifecycle updates.
- Preserved the view regression proving returned card state is reflected after save and still appears when the edit modal is reopened.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/workboard.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/workboard.test.ts` passed, 82 tests.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/workboard/src/store.test.ts extensions/workboard/src/gateway.test.ts` passed, 75 tests.
- `pnpm check:test-types` passed.
- `pnpm lint` passed.
- `pnpm run format:check -- ui/src/ui/controllers/workboard.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/workboard.test.ts` passed.
- `git diff --check` passed.
target.author: turbotheturtle
